ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station above sea level */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the weather station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed on the station */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the station (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather observation */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station */,
  "observation_date" TEXT /* Date of the observation */,
  "prcp" REAL /* Precipitation amount (in mm) */,
  "snow" REAL /* Snowfall amount (in mm) */,
  "snwd" REAL /* Snow depth (in mm) */,
  "tmax" REAL /* Maximum temperature (in °F) */,
  "tmin" REAL /* Minimum temperature (in °F) */,
  "tobs" REAL /* Temperature observed (in °F) */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Average wind speed (in mph) */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction (e.g., N, NE, E) */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity (in %) */,
  "atmospheric_pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure (in hPa) */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Cloud cover (in %) */,
  "solar_radiation" REAL /* Solar radiation (in W/m²) */,
  "uv_index" REAL /* UV index */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility (in miles) */,
  "weather_code" INTEGER /* Code representing the weather condition (e.g., 1 for clear, 2 for cloudy, 3 for rainy) */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Flag indicating the quality of the observation (e.g., good, suspect, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_observations_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., Precipitation, Snow Depth) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric (e.g., mm, °F, %) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the metric (e.g., for anomaly detection) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric data (e.g., sensor, satellite, manual observation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather observation being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES weather_observations ("observation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather forecast */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station for the forecast */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "predicted_tmax" REAL /* Predicted maximum temperature (in °F) */,
  "predicted_tmin" REAL /* Predicted minimum temperature (in °F) */,
  "predicted_wind_speed" REAL /* Predicted average wind speed (in mph) */,
  "predicted_wind_direction" TEXT /* Predicted wind direction */,
  "predicted_humidity" REAL /* Predicted relative humidity (in %) */,
  "predicted_atmospheric_pressure" REAL /* Predicted atmospheric pressure (in hPa) */,
  "predicted_cloud_cover" REAL /* Predicted cloud cover (in %) */,
  "predicted_solar_radiation" REAL /* Predicted solar radiation (in W/m²) */,
  "predicted_uv_index" REAL /* Predicted UV index */,
  "predicted_visibility" REAL /* Predicted visibility (in miles) */,
  "forecast_method" TEXT /* Method used for the forecast (e.g., statistical, numerical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_forecasts_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)
